bead.title: auth-schema: control-plane migrations for tenancy/auth tables
bead.description:
Add migrations for: tenants, users, user_identities, tenant_users, tenant_databases, credential_revocations, audit_retention_policies. Enforce UNIQUE(tenants.name), UNIQUE(user_identities.provider, subject), PK(tenant_users.tenant_id, user_id). Runs on SQLite + Postgres via sqlx.

Depends on: nothing (blocks A2 and everything downstream).

Test as you implement:
- Round-trip test: apply migration to empty DB, verify schema, tear down, re-apply (idempotent)
- Constraint test: attempt duplicate inserts, verify rejection
- Both backends (SQLite + Postgres) under axon-storage conformance suite
bead.acceptance:
- [ ] Migration applies to empty SQLite + Postgres DB
- [ ] Re-applying migration is idempotent (no errors, no duplicate rows)
- [ ] UNIQUE(tenants.name) rejects duplicate tenant names
- [ ] UNIQUE(user_identities.provider, subject) rejects duplicate federation rows
- [ ] PK(tenant_users.tenant_id, user_id) rejects duplicate memberships
- [ ] Round-trip test added to axon-storage tests
- [ ] cargo test -p axon-storage green on both backends
